fix_commits: 4afae82 fix(contracts): locate Elixir def with do-block body (VAL-013)

diff_stat.notes: exhaustive_matrix.rs is new (2571 lines); contracts.rs is +72/-15

summary: Exhaustive matrix audit: 38 language-applicable commands × 18 languages = 684 cells, plus 10 sanity-only orchestrator tests. 658 cells PASS, 36 IGNORE with file:line citation, 0 FAILED. Discovered and fixed an Elixir contracts bug where `def name do...end` was not located because tree-sitter-elixir doesn't expose `arguments` as a named field. VAL-010/VAL-011's 234 cells unchanged. Pre-existing surface::typescript test failure in tldr-core is unrelated.

documented_capability_gaps.rationale: explicit Language::Python guard rejects all other languages with UnsupportedLanguage
walker filters for .py extension only, all other extensions skipped
dispatch match has no arms for these languages; fall-through to UnsupportedLanguage

harness_features: panic detection scans stderr for `panicked at` / `Stack backtrace:` / negative exit codes
documented exit-code scheme [0..=99] (per error.rs:286-340 plus diagnostics 60/61)
embedding_mutex serializes embed/semantic/similar to avoid fastembed cache races
per-language entry_function() picks `Main` for csharp, `main` for others
command-first test naming for visible failure clusters
